title: EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: WE CARE EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited financial assistance for emergency needs such as past-due rent, rental deposits, electricity, gas, garbage, water, and small non-covered medical bills. May also assist with minor car repairs with safety issues and other miscellaneous emergencies. Prospective clients must be able to demonstrate the ability to sustain needs post-assistance. Individuals who have not previously received aid from the agency may be given application priority. 602 SW Madison Avenue Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: -Unrestricted for most assistance -Individuals experiencing homelessness and living in car for vehicle expenses Hours: Phone and email: Monday-Wednesday 10am-4pm Church office: Varies Email (541) 203-0102 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 203-0102 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to complete application -Call or email for more information -A copy of the application can be picked up at the church office. Call to verify office hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Completed application -Copy of the most recent utility or medical bill -Copy of the lease for rental assistance -Written cost estimate from a repair shop, a copy of your driver’s license, car insurance, and registration for vehicle expenses AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Medical Care Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Repair Services Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Homelessness Issues Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WE CARE
